title: Briful 55cm Tall Artificial Monstera Plants in Ceramic Pot, 21.7" Large Fake Plants Monstera Plant Artificial Greenery Decorative Artificial Plants for Home Office Hotel Decoration
features: Deceptively realistic: With the typical light-dark, real touch soft green leaf structure, the artificial greenery looks like the real thing. The attractive shape of its leaves has given the houseplant its name monstera plant.
Large Fake Monstera Plants: The tall artificial plant sits in a shiny white ceramic pot, realistically designed with artificial soil. The weight of pot ensures that the house plant cannot tip over.

With this artificial plant for decorations, you can beautify a lightless bathroom and make it more homely. But also a holiday home, a shop window or an office loosen up decorative artificial plants with fresh green without you having to invest a lot of effort for this decoration with green plants.

With its hollowed leaves, the realistic plant artificial quickly creates a holiday mood. The faux plant in pot has a total height of around 21.7"/55cm. The white ceramic pot has an approximate height of 12.5 x 13cm( D*H ).

The artificial green plant also brings fresh greenery to the decoration in public areas, offices and hotel lobby, but does not require any care apart from occasional dusting. So you get a completely uncomplicated, realistic faux plant.
